resume_text: Junior backend engineer with one year of professional experience building REST APIs in Python and FastAPI. Contributed to internal billing services and ran first production deploy with Docker and PostgreSQL. Looking to join a fast-moving early-stage team where I can own services end-to-end. Comfortable pairing, asking questions, and learning the operational side of distributed systems.

Frontend engineer focused on building accessible, performant React applications with Next.js and TypeScript. Shipped marketing surfaces and dashboard features at Vercel. Care a lot about design polish, animations, and performance budgets. Eager to grow into a full-stack role at a product-led startup.

Backend engineer working in Go on infrastructure tooling. Built internal gRPC services and helm charts during my first year at HashiCorp. Curious about distributed systems and scheduling. Want to join a small team where I can write Go in production every day.

Backend engineer at Amazon building internal services for the retail org. Comfortable with Python, Django, Redis caching layers, and AWS primitives like Lambda, SQS, and DynamoDB. Looking for a smaller environment where I can shape architecture instead of inheriting it.

Full-stack engineer at Render building developer tooling and the deploy pipeline UI. Strong with TypeScript, Node.js, Prisma and PostgreSQL. Have shipped features end-to-end from spec to migration to production rollout. Want to join a remote-first seed-stage company with a strong engineering bar.

Junior data engineer at Monzo working on the analytics platform. Build Airflow DAGs in Python, model data in dbt, and write a lot of SQL against BigQuery. Interested in moving deeper into data infrastructure and exploring streaming systems.

Junior engineer at Shopify on a checkout feature team. Comfortable in Rails monoliths, write good Sidekiq jobs, and have learned a lot about migrations at scale. Looking for a Ruby-heavy startup where I can grow into mid-level.

ML engineer at Scale AI working on data quality pipelines for LLM fine-tuning. Comfortable training and evaluating models in PyTorch, serving inference behind FastAPI, and writing pragmatic Python. Want to work on applied LLM products at an early-stage AI startup.

Rust engineer at Qdrant contributing to the vector search engine. Comfortable with async Rust, Tokio, and low-level performance work. Curious about databases and storage engines. Want to keep writing Rust full-time at a serious infra startup.

Frontend engineer at GitLab working on the merge request UI. Vue and Nuxt are home for me, but I am comfortable picking up React. Strong sense for accessibility and care about test coverage. Want to join a tight remote team building a developer-facing product.

Full-stack engineer at Notion working on the API platform. Comfortable across Python and TypeScript, write FastAPI services, and have shipped React components used by millions. Looking to join an early-stage startup where I can wear more hats.

Junior backend engineer at N26 building event-driven services in Java and Spring Boot on top of Kafka. First exposure to high-throughput payments systems. Want to keep doing JVM backend work but at a smaller, faster company.

Backend engineer working remotely from Bogotá with a U.S.-based health tech company. Django, Celery, PostgreSQL stack. Comfortable building HIPAA-conscious services. Looking to join an English-speaking startup with strong async culture.

Backend engineer at Ramp building GraphQL APIs for the spend management product. Strong with TypeScript, Node.js, and PostgreSQL. Care about API design and developer experience. Want to join a smaller fintech where I can have more architectural say.

Backend engineer at Klarna working on the merchant onboarding service. Mostly Python and Flask. Curious about Temporal and durable execution. Want to learn from senior engineers at an early-stage startup.

Backend engineer at Razorpay shipping serverless services on AWS. Comfortable with FastAPI, DynamoDB, and Lambda. Have built event-driven flows for fraud detection. Want to join a U.S. startup as a fully remote engineer.

Software engineer at Datadog working on the agent team. Go all day, every day. Have learned the operational side of large fleets. Want to keep doing Go infra work at a smaller startup with more product ownership.

Junior full-stack engineer at HubSpot. TypeScript, React, Node.js. First production rotation taught me a lot about feature flags, gradual rollouts, and incident response. Want to grow into a more senior individual contributor at a small team.

Full-stack engineer placed via Andela at a U.S. fintech. Django on the backend, React on the frontend. Have shipped a lot of forms, KYC flows, and admin tools. Want to join a startup directly as a remote engineer.

Engineer at Anthropic on the developer platform team. Python and FastAPI. Have shipped internal tools used across the company. Looking to join a small AI-native startup where I can ship product directly.

Mid-level backend engineer at Stripe on the dispute lifecycle team. Python, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Redis, Celery. Owned a payout reconciliation service that processes millions of events daily. Want to take that ownership to an earlier-stage company where the same skills compound faster.

Full-stack engineer at Datadog working on integrations and the dashboard editor. TypeScript end to end. Comfortable owning features from API design through UI rollout. Want a more product-focused environment with clearer customer feedback.

Systems engineer at Cloudflare working on Workers internals. Go and Rust. Comfortable in a low-level performance-sensitive codebase. Want to join an earlier-stage infra startup where I can be in the top three engineers, not the top three hundred.

education.institution: Moscow Institute of Physics and Technology

resume_text: Mid-level Rust engineer at Discord working on message storage. Built and operated services at the billion-message-per-day scale. Want to keep writing Rust at a smaller infra-flavored startup.

Frontend engineer at Linear working on the issue editor and command menu. Care deeply about latency, animation, and keyboard accessibility. Strong with TypeScript, React, and GraphQL. Want to keep working on tools for builders.

Backend engineer at Nubank for four years, mostly on lending. Python, Django, PostgreSQL on AWS managed via Terraform. Comfortable with on-call and incident response. Want to join a U.S. startup remotely.

Data engineer at Convoy building the analytics warehouse. Spark, Airflow, Snowflake, dbt. Have rebuilt the marketplace metrics pipeline twice. Want to join a smaller team where data infrastructure is treated as core product.

Backend engineer at Revolut on the cards platform. Java, Spring Boot, Kafka, PostgreSQL. Have shipped many event-driven services and learned a lot about consistency in money movement. Want to keep doing JVM backend work at a more focused product company.

ML engineer with two years at OpenAI on training infrastructure. PyTorch, Ray, large-scale data pipelines. Strong applied research instincts. Want to join an early-stage AI startup where I can build product, not just infra.

SRE at Datadog for four years. Go, Kubernetes, Terraform, AWS. Have run incident commander rotations and built observability platforms used by hundreds of teams. Want to be the first or second SRE at a Series A startup.

Backend engineer at Faire on the order workflow team. Heavy Temporal user — have built durable order, refund, and notification workflows. Comfortable with FastAPI and PostgreSQL too. Want to join a Temporal-native startup.

Backend engineer at Intercom on the inbox team. Mostly Python and Ruby. Have led migrations off legacy services. Want to join an earlier-stage company where the codebase is younger and decisions matter more.

Backend engineer at Spotify on the playlists API. TypeScript, Node.js, GraphQL, PostgreSQL. Have shipped features used by hundreds of millions of users. Want to step into a smaller environment where my work has more direct impact.
Backend engineer at Pinecone on the index serving layer. Strong Python and Postgres skills, hands-on with pgvector and other vector index implementations. Want to join an AI-native product startup.

Full-stack engineer at Shopify on a payments squad. TypeScript on the front and back end. Comfortable with React and Node.js. Want to join an earlier-stage commerce startup with more architectural latitude.
Backend engineer at Confluent on Kafka Connect. Strong Python and JVM skills. Have run multi-region rollouts. Want to bring streaming experience to an earlier-stage company.
Platform engineer at Render building the multi-tenant Kubernetes substrate. Go, Helm, Prometheus. Have deep experience with operators and controllers. Want to bring that to a smaller team.

Full-stack engineer at Atlassian working on Jira's automation product. Django on the backend, React on the frontend. Have led several feature launches. Want a smaller environment with more direct customer feedback.
Full-stack engineer at Figma on the comments and notifications product. TypeScript across the stack. Care about clean abstractions and good DX. Want to keep building product at a smaller place.
Backend engineer at Adyen on the risk team. Python, FastAPI, Kafka, GCP. Have built fraud detection services that handle thousands of TPS. Want a smaller scale and a faster feedback loop.

ML engineer at Hugging Face working on the inference endpoints product. PyTorch, FastAPI, vector databases. Comfortable shipping LLM-backed APIs to production. Want to join an applied AI startup with a strong product vision.
Backend engineer at Twilio on the Verify product. Python, Django, Postgres on AWS. Have rotated through on-call for years. Want a more product-led seat at a smaller company.
Backend engineer at Amazon on the AWS Lambda team. Java, Spring Boot, Kafka. Want to leave big tech for a Series A or B startup where I can have a larger surface.
Full-stack engineer at Kavak working on the inventory pricing product. Python, FastAPI, React. Want to take Latin American marketplace experience to a U.S. startup remotely.

Backend engineer at Temporal Technologies. Go, Postgres, Kubernetes. Have contributed to the worker SDKs and helped on-board major customers. Want to work at a company building heavily on Temporal — practitioner side.
Full-stack engineer at Wise on the consumer money movement product. TypeScript, Node.js, React, Postgres. Want to join a smaller fintech where I can drive architecture, not just contribute to it.
Backend engineer at Plaid on the link product. Python, FastAPI, Postgres, Redis. Comfortable with high-traffic API surfaces. Want a smaller fintech or developer tools startup.
Frontend engineer at Wayfair on the seller experience. Next.js, Tailwind, tRPC. Have led several rebuilds. Want to keep building product UI at a smaller company.
Backend engineer at Zapier on the integrations platform. Django, Celery, Postgres. Comfortable in a fully async, fully remote environment. Want to keep that culture at a smaller startup.
Backend engineer at Neo4j on the graph data science library. Python, Cypher, FastAPI. Comfortable with graph modeling problems. Want to join a startup that uses graphs as a core data structure.

Senior engineer at Stripe leading the disputes platform. Architected the move to event-sourced state with Kafka. Python, FastAPI, Postgres, Kubernetes. Looking for a Series A or B where I can be one of the first senior backend engineers.

Senior full-stack engineer at Airbnb on the host experience product. TypeScript, React, GraphQL, Node.js. Have led 0-to-1 features and large refactors. Want a smaller environment with more product ownership.

Senior systems engineer with a decade of platform experience. Built and operated multi-tenant Kubernetes systems at scale. Go, Terraform, Kubernetes, AWS. Want to be a foundational engineer at an infra-flavored startup.
Senior engineer at Monzo working on the lending product. Python, Django, Postgres, GCP. Have led a team and managed an on-call rotation. Want a smaller fintech where senior IC work matters more.
Senior Rust engineer at Fly.io on the orchestrator. Tokio, Postgres, WASM internals. Want to keep doing systems Rust at a smaller infra startup.

Senior ML engineer at Anthropic on inference. Python, PyTorch, Ray. Comfortable with both systems-y ML work and shipping product-facing APIs. Want to be one of the first MLEs at an applied AI startup.
Senior engineer at Mercari on the marketplace platform. Go, Kubernetes, Postgres, Kafka. Multilingual Japanese / English engineer wanting to join a U.S. startup remotely or with relocation.
Senior engineer at Personio building HR workflow infrastructure. Python, FastAPI, Postgres. Heavy Temporal user. Want to join a small Temporal-native startup as a foundational engineer.
Senior full-stack engineer at Notion on collaboration features. Strong TypeScript across the stack. Have led multi-quarter projects. Looking for a smaller team where senior IC craft matters.
Senior data engineer at Uber on the marketplace data team. Spark, Airflow, BigQuery. Have led platform migrations and big rewrites. Want to bring data platform experience to a Series B/C startup.

Senior backend engineer at Indeed on the matching platform. Python, FastAPI, Postgres on AWS. Have led services that handle hundreds of millions of requests daily. Want a smaller team where I can move faster.
Senior frontend engineer at Cabify. Vue and Nuxt expert with strong product instincts. Want to bring polished frontend craft to a U.S. or European startup.
Senior backend engineer at Confluent on Cloud Kafka. Go, Postgres, Kubernetes. Strong distributed systems intuition. Want to be a foundational engineer at a Series A streaming or infra company.
Senior backend engineer at Buffer in a fully remote setup for five years. Django, Postgres, Redis. Strong async-communication-first engineer. Want to bring that to a small startup.
Senior engineer at BMW connected services. Java and Spring Boot stack. Want to leave automotive enterprise for a fast-moving European startup.
Senior engineer at Wiz. Python, FastAPI, Postgres on AWS. Strong security background. Want to bring it to a Series A or B company.
Senior full-stack engineer at Vercel on the dashboard product. TypeScript, Next.js, Node.js. Have led 0-to-1 launches. Want to be one of the first senior product engineers at a Series A startup.
Senior backend engineer at Asana on the search platform. Python, FastAPI, Postgres, Kafka. Want to take search and platform experience to a smaller team.
Senior backend engineer at Coupang. Go, Postgres, Kubernetes. Have shipped at very high scale. Want to bring that to a U.S. startup.

Senior backend engineer at Scale AI. Python, FastAPI, Neo4j, Temporal. Forward-deployed background means I know how to ship product fast against fuzzy specs. Want to be a foundational engineer at an applied AI startup.
Senior engineer at Linear with deep frontend specialization. TypeScript, Next.js, Tailwind. Have led product launches and obsess over detail. Want to keep that craft level at a smaller startup.
Senior SRE at Snowflake. Go, Kubernetes, Terraform, AWS. Have led incident response programs. Want to be the first dedicated SRE at a Series B company.
Senior engineer at Replicate building model hosting infrastructure. Python, FastAPI, PyTorch, Postgres. Want to stay in applied ML infra at a smaller startup.
Senior full-stack engineer at Remote.com. TypeScript, Node.js, React, GraphQL. Have led platform initiatives. Want to be a foundational hire at a Series A.
Senior+ engineer at Rappi on the merchant platform. Django, Postgres, Celery. Have led migrations and performance work. Want to bring this to a U.S. or European Series A.
Senior JVM backend engineer at Satispay. Java, Kotlin, Spring Boot, Kafka. Want to take payments experience to a fast-moving European fintech.

Staff engineer at Stripe leading a multi-team initiative on dispute platform consolidation. Python, FastAPI, Kafka, Kubernetes. Strong technical leader. Want to step into a foundational staff role at a Series B startup.
Staff engineer at Zendesk leading the messaging platform. Go, Kubernetes, Postgres on AWS. Have set platform direction across teams. Want to be a foundational staff engineer at a Series B.
Staff engineer at Datadog leading frontend platform. TypeScript, Node.js, GraphQL. Have driven multi-team initiatives. Want to take that to a smaller, faster company.
Staff engineer at Careem (Uber subsidiary). Java, Spring Boot, Kafka, AWS. Have led architecture for the rides platform. Want to bring scale experience to a smaller, faster company.
Staff engineer at Doctolib leading the appointment booking platform. Python, FastAPI, Postgres, Kafka. Want to be the first staff engineer at a smaller European startup.
Staff Rust engineer at Cloudflare. Tokio, Postgres, Kubernetes. Have driven low-level infra direction. Want to be foundational staff at a Rust-heavy infra startup.
Staff engineer at OpenAI on inference platform. Python, PyTorch, Ray, FastAPI. Have led across organizations. Want to be a foundational staff at an applied AI Series B.
Staff engineer at ING leading retail banking platform engineering. Java, Spring, Postgres, AWS. Want to leave banking for a fast-moving fintech startup.

Staff engineer at Coinbase leading custody platform. Heavy Temporal user — built durable workflows for fund movements. Python, FastAPI, Postgres, Kubernetes. Want to take Temporal expertise to a Temporal-first startup.
Staff engineer at GitHub leading the Actions runtime. Go, Postgres, Kafka, Kubernetes. Have led architecture and run incident programs. Want to bring developer-tools expertise to a Series B.
Staff engineer at DeepMind on research infrastructure. Python, Django, Postgres, GCP. Want to bring research-infra reliability to an applied AI startup.
Staff data engineer at LinkedIn working on the messaging platform. Java, Scala, Spark, AWS. Want to step into a smaller environment as a data platform leader.

Staff full-stack engineer at Shopify on the storefront platform. TypeScript, React, Node.js, Postgres. Have led platform modernization. Want to take it to a smaller commerce or developer-tools company.

education.institution: Universidade Federal do Rio de Janeiro

resume_text: Principal engineer at Netflix leading edge platform direction. Go, Postgres, Kafka, Kubernetes, AWS. Have set architecture across organizations. Want to be a principal/founding engineer at a serious infra Series C.
Principal engineer at Anthropic. Deep ML systems and inference background. Python, PyTorch, Ray. Want to be a founding/principal engineer at a small applied AI startup.
Principal engineer at Amazon on AWS Kinesis. Java, Scala, Kafka, AWS. Have set platform direction across hundreds of services. Want a principal seat at a smaller scale-up.
Principal engineer at Spotify on platform engineering. Python, FastAPI, Postgres, Kafka, Kubernetes. Want to take platform DNA to a smaller company.

Principal engineer at Uber. Was an early adopter of Temporal/Cadence and shaped its use across the marketplace. Go, Postgres, Kafka, Kubernetes. Want to be a founding/principal engineer at a Temporal-native startup.
Senior engineer at Klaviyo on the API platform. TypeScript, Node.js, Postgres, GraphQL. Want a smaller team for more direct impact.
Senior backend engineer at Segment / Twilio. Python, FastAPI, Postgres, AWS, Terraform. Want to bring data-platform experience to a smaller startup.
Senior backend engineer at Mattermost. Go, Postgres, Kubernetes, Terraform. Want to be a foundational engineer at a smaller infra-flavored startup.
Senior backend engineer at Flutterwave. Python, FastAPI, Postgres, AWS. Want to take African fintech experience to a global Series A.
Staff engineer at Weaviate building the vector search engine. Strong with Python, FastAPI, pgvector, Kubernetes. Want to take vector-search expertise to an applied AI Series B.
Senior full-stack engineer at Schibsted. TypeScript, Node.js, React, Postgres. Want a smaller European startup with strong product DNA.
